dict.string: To upload photos to the game, Rise of Castles needs "Camera" permissions on your phone.
To offer you customized content, we need to have access to your IDFA. You may cancel the authorization on your phone via Settings -> Privacy -> Tracking Services.v
You need permission to open albums.
Rise of Castles will not connect to devices on your local network,it will only detect connectivity with your local gateway.You can revise the access setting in Settings > Privacy > Local Network.
To use some in-game Countdown functions, Rise of Castles needs "Calendar" permissions on your phone.
To use voice communication in the game, Rise of Castles needs "Microphone" permissions on your phone.
To upload photos to the game, Rise of Castles needs "Photos" permissions on your phone.
